role_summary: the income tax advisor provides advisory and comp liance support related to income tax  laws for individuals, businesses, or government bodies.
responsibilities: • advise on income tax compliance and planning   • prepare and review income tax returns   • support assessments, appeals, and representations   • interpre t tax laws and circulars   • assist in litigation and dispute resolution   • maintain accurate tax documentation
qualifications: • chartered accountant   • strong expertise in income tax act and procedures   • advisory and representation skills
